title: NYC Geoclient v2 subscription key missing
detail: Geoclient v2 requires a free subscription key from the NYC API Developers Portal. Research (M0-T002) is complete without it; live fixture capture and official rate-limit confirmation are blocked.
exact_human_action: Sign up at https://api-portal.nyc.gov/, subscribe to product 'Geoclient User' selecting 'Geoclient - v2', copy the key from Profile -> Subscriptions -> Show, record the rate limits displayed on the subscription page, and provide the key as GEOCLIENT_SUBSCRIPTION_KEY in the harness secret store.
where_to_enter: Harness/OS secret store; later Render/GitHub Actions encrypted secrets for CI smoke tests
how_it_will_be_tested: GET https://api.nyc.gov/geoclient/v2/address with documented sample params and header Ocp-Apim-Subscription-Key from env; expected: 200 JSON with bbl/bin fields. Key never echoed.
